title: statice minuta var. calcarae
intro: Statice minuta var. calcarae, also known as the 'Small Sea Lavender' or 'Low Sea Lavender', is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Statice minuta var. calcarae include its use in treating conditions such as dyspepsia, diarrhea, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Statice minuta var. calcarae typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications.
